utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Each item is fully detailed: destination (Prague, Czech Republic), travel_dates (October 25–29, 2024), transportation (flight details and cost), accommodation (hotel details and costs), activities (specific activity and cost), additional_services (restaurant recommendations with cost per person), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown and remaining budget). llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the destination 'Prague, Czech Republic', which corresponds to a rating of 7 in the ground-truth list. The accommodation is described as a 'City center hotel property (4 nights) - €450 total (€90/night)'; this most closely matches 'Eco Lodge' in the ground truth, which is €90/night and rated 10.
